ideation: This animation sequence portrays a woman office worker in a confident and composed manner.  The animation will start with her arms relaxed at her sides, then transition to a gesture where she holds a pen or stylus, and finally return to a neutral pose. The sequence will emphasize controlled, professional movements.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at sides, ready for work
right hand lifts to hold an imaginary pen, poised
arms return to a composed, neutral stance
